description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox autonomous vehicle, traveling west on 21st Street toward Folsom Street in San Francisco, stopped next to parked vehicles with 
active hazard lights to pick up a passenger. Just after the passenger entered the Zoox vehicle, a passenger car (Vehicle 2) traveling behind 
attempted to pass on the left and swiped the Zoox vehicle's left rear fender.  The Zoox vehicle was towed from the scene and was found to 
have sustained minor damage. No injuries were reported, and police were not notified.
Print
Clear Form
